---
title: "Tools"
author: "Trey Saddler"
date: "2024/03/31"
---

## Introduction

This page will document various tools that could help with this process.

- [LangChain Model Laboratory](https://python.langchain.com/docs/guides/model_laboratory)
- {{< iconify logos github-icon >}} [Microsoft PromptBench](https://github.com/microsoft/promptbench)
- {{< iconify logos github-icon >}}[HegelAI PromptTools](https://github.com/hegelai/prompttools)
- {{< iconify logos github-icon >}} [Awesome-ML LLM Tools](https://github.com/underlines/awesome-ml/blob/master/llm-tools.md#benchmark-suites)
- ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide/main/public/144-favicon.svg){height=1em} [PromptingGuide.ai | Dair.ai](https://www.promptingguide.ai/tools)
- {{< iconify logos github-icon >}} [OpenAGI](https://github.com/agiresearch/OpenAGI)
(https://github.com/NCBI-Codeathons/mlxai-2024-team-saddler)
- <https://github.com/Azure/azure-quickstart-templates>
- <https://aztfmod.github.io/documentation/>
- <https://github.com/microsoft/JARVIS>
- <https://github.com/Azure/Azurite>
- <https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow>
- <https://github.com/microsoft/DeepSpeed>
- <https://codeql.github.com/>
